html:
Exclusive to:

“Catch small flying things and put them or their loot in your inventory.”

-

The Thulecite Bug Net is a Tool exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in the Skill Spotlight: Walter, Wendy & Wortox update. The Blueprint can be obtained by feeding Amberosia to a Dust Moth.

The Thulecite Bug Net functions as a direct upgrade to the Bug Net, possessing much higher durability.

Assets

  • Equipped
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

DSTDSRoGSWHam
plainText:
Thulecite Bug Net
"Catch bugs the ancient way."
Combat
4.25
Object Info
Perk
Allows the player to catch bugs.
Equipable
100 uses (Catching)
34 uses (Damage)
Does not stack
Crafting
×2 ×1
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"thulecitebugnet"
Exclusive to:
“Anyone catch the latest buzz?”
–Wilson
“I should try this one on Webber.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang wouldn't hurt fly.”
–Wolfgang
“The net comes for us all.”
–Wendy
“CATCH AND DESTROY”
–WX-78
“Thulecite. An interesting choice.”
–Wickerbottom
“Another day, another skeeter.”
–Woodie
“I'm glad I'm not an insect.”
–Maxwell
“Nöt even the smallest öf prey shall escape.”
–Wigfrid
“We can make that with our beard!”
–Webber
“I don't mind the taste of bug.”
–Warly
“Bug friends, don't be scared!”
–Wormwood
“The old stuff was built to last.”
–Winona
“Fly away? Not today!”
–Wortox
“Come out, bugs! Florp!”
–Wurt
“Just minding my own buzzness, Woby. Hehe.”
–Walter
“I've seen this before.”
–Wanda
“Catch small flying things and put them or their loot in your inventory.”
-
The Thulecite Bug Net is a Tool exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in the Skill Spotlight: Walter, Wendy & Wortox update. The Blueprint can be obtained by feeding Amberosia to a Dust Moth.
The Thulecite Bug Net functions as a direct upgrade to the Bug Net, possessing much higher durability.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Lưới Côn trùng Thulecite là một Công cụ độc quyền của Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong bản cập nhật Skill Spotlight: Walter, Wendy & Wortox. Bản Kế hoạch chi tiết có thể thu được bằng cách cho Bướm đêm bụi ăn Amberosia.
